author: codex-agent

patch.value: Implement governance query controls from 2026-04-06 issue report

Deliver non-dedupe follow-ups from the external seven-issue report: comments ownership hint, aggregate grouped counts, list projection/sort controls, health refresh controls, and expanded comments-audit filters.
Issue report items 1 and 3 through 7 are implemented with tests, docs, contracts, completion, and Pi wrapper parity while preserving backward-compatible defaults.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm context --limit 10; pm search 'list fields compact sort order list-all projection' --limit 20; pm search 'comments-audit parent tag sprint release priority filters' --limit 20; pm search 'health check-only no-refresh refresh-vectors' --limit 20; pm search 'aggregate group-by parent type count child counts' --limit 20; pm search 'ownership conflict allow-audit-comment remediation hint' --limit 20; pm list-open --limit 50; pm list-in-progress --limit 50. Net-new because matching items are either closed or only partially overlapping and no active feature currently tracks this combined non-dedupe scope.'
